description: Jordan's Prime Minister, Bisher Khasawneh, emphasized the railway's potential to enhance the country's logistics and export capabilities.  Additionally, discussions are ongoing with UAE companies about re-establishing the Maan dry port to further strengthen Jordan's logistics network.

title: 2.4 Jordan Railway Assessment | Digital Logistics Capacity Assessments
description: Railway Companies and Consortia Jordan has two main state-owned operators: Hedjaz Jordan Railway (HJR) - a government-owned entity that operates heritage and limited passenger services, as well as some freight transport between Amman and Damascus (currently suspended due to the Syria conflict).

title: Strategiecs Think Tank - Rail Network Strategy: Jordanian hopes and ...
description: Rail Network Strategy: Jordanian hopes and Search for Regional Integration This paper provides an overview of the national railway network project, which was announced in the Government's Economic Priorities Program for 2021-2023, explaining the economic basis of the project based on theoretical references of the railway sector.

title: Jordan Rail Network Profile - Possession Planning
description: Jordan Rail Network Profile Jordan's rail infrastructure development represents a crucial step in modernizing the nation's transportation network and enhancing its position as a regional logistics hub.

title: UAE, Jordan sign $2.3bn agreement to build railway - Arab News
description: RIYADH: The UAE has signed a $2. 3 billion deal to develop a 360-km railway network linking Jordan's Aqaba port to the country's mining hubs at Al-Shidiya and Ghor Al-Safi.
